announcement_body.headline: Square Enix Golden Week Sale
announcement_body.body: [p]Discover heroic stories born in Japan including FINAL FANTASY, NieR, KINGDOM HEARTS, OCTOPATH TRAVELER, and more, now at golden prices.[/p]

subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
The Square Enix Publisher Sale is now on - save up to 90% off!
With over 200+ discounted games in the SQUARE ENIX Publisher Sale, our *NEW* host, Matthew Mercer, is here to help you find your next RPG adventure - accompanied by our long-time bestie Ben Starr... whether we asked for it or not.
Watch the full video on YouTube and discover which RPG you should dive into next: https://youtu.be/joDXWCNf-JM
body_raw:
The Square Enix Publisher Sale is now on - save up to 90% off! 

With over 200+ discounted games in the SQUARE ENIX Publisher Sale, our *NEW* host, Matthew Mercer, is here to help you find your next RPG adventure - accompanied by our long-time bestie Ben Starr... whether we asked for it or not.

Watch the full video on YouTube and discover which RPG you should dive into next: https://youtu.be/joDXWCNf-JM

announcement_body.headline: Square Enix Publisher Sale 2026
announcement_body.body: [p]Revisit timeless tales and create iconic memories with Square Enix including FINAL FANTASY, DRAGON QUEST, KINGDOM HEARTS,  NieR, OCTOPATH TRAVELER, and much more! [/p]

subtitle: see announcement body
body_text: Step inside Square Enix's winter wonderland and discover frosted favorites, such as, FINAL FANTASY XVI, Life is Strange: Double Exposure, NieR:Automata, KINGDOM HEARTS -HD 1.5+2.5 ReMIX-, Life is Strange Remastered Collection, and more!
body_raw: [p]Step inside Square Enix's winter wonderland and discover frosted favorites, such as, FINAL FANTASY XVI, Life is Strange: Double Exposure, NieR:Automata, KINGDOM HEARTS -HD 1.5+2.5 ReMIX-, Life is Strange Remastered Collection, and more![/p]

announcement_body.headline: Square Enix Winter Sale
announcement_body.body: [p]Step inside Square Enix's winter wonderland and discover frosted favorites, such as, FINAL FANTASY XVI, Life is Strange: Double Exposure, NieR:Automata, KINGDOM HEARTS -HD 1.5+2.5 ReMIX-, Life is Strange Remastered Collection, and more![/p]

subtitle: see announcement body
body_text: Wrap up the year with Square Enix's hottest titles like FINAL FANTASY VII REBIRTH, FINAL FANTASY XVI, OCTOPATH TRAVELER II, Life is Strange: Double Exposure, and more!
body_raw: [p]Wrap up the year with Square Enix's hottest titles like FINAL FANTASY VII REBIRTH, FINAL FANTASY XVI, OCTOPATH TRAVELER II, Life is Strange: Double Exposure, and more![/p]

announcement_body.headline: Square Enix Winter Sale 2025
announcement_body.body: [p]Wrap up the year with Square Enix's hottest titles like FINAL FANTASY VII REBIRTH, FINAL FANTASY XVI, OCTOPATH TRAVELER II, Life is Strange: Double Exposure, and more![/p]

subtitle: see announcement body
body_text: Sweater weather is here! Find great deals on fall favorites like DRAGON QUEST III HD-2D Remake, FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE INTERGRADE, Life is Strange: True Colors, PowerWash Simulator, and more!

announcement_body.headline: Square Enix Black Friday Sale 2025
announcement_body.body: [p]Sweater weather is here! Find great deals on fall favorites like DRAGON QUEST III HD-2D Remake, FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE INTERGRADE, Life is Strange: True Colors, PowerWash Simulator, and more! [/p]

subtitle: see announcement body
body_text: Take next-gen gaming to another level at the Tokyo Game Show! Save big on the latest RPGs from Square Enix like FINAL FANTASY VII REBIRTH, FINAL FANTASY XVI, DRAGON QUEST III HD-2D Remake, and much more.
body_raw: [p]Take next-gen gaming to another level at the Tokyo Game Show! Save big on the latest RPGs from Square Enix like FINAL FANTASY VII REBIRTH, FINAL FANTASY XVI, DRAGON QUEST III HD-2D Remake, and much more.[/p]

announcement_body.headline: Square Enix TGS Sale 2025
announcement_body.body: [p]Take next-gen gaming to another level at the Tokyo Game Show! Save big on the latest RPGs from Square Enix like FINAL FANTASY VII REBIRTH, FINAL FANTASY XVI, DRAGON QUEST III HD-2D Remake, and much more.[/p]

announcement_body.headline: Final Fantasy Franchise Sale
announcement_body.body: [p]Discover the legend of the powerful crystal within the FINAL FANTASY franchise on sale.[/p]

subtitle: see announcement body
body_text: Surf the waves at Costa Del Sol this summer with Cloud and friends in FINAL FANTASY VII REBIRTH! -Play the game that started it all, the classic FINAL FANTASY VII.-Dive into Zack Fair's gripping backstory in CRISIS CORE –FINAL FANTASY VII– REUNION.-Explore the outskirts of Midgar as Yuffie on her jampacked adventure in FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE INTERGRADE.
body_raw: [p]Surf the waves at Costa Del Sol this summer with Cloud and friends in FINAL FANTASY VII REBIRTH!  [/p][p]-Play the game that started it all, the classic FINAL FANTASY VII.[/p][p]-Dive into Zack Fair's gripping backstory in CRISIS CORE –FINAL FANTASY VII– REUNION.[/p][p]-Explore the outskirts of Midgar as Yuffie on her jampacked adventure in FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE INTERGRADE.[/p][p][/p]

announcement_body.headline: Square Enix Summer Sale
announcement_body.body: [p]Surf the waves at Costa Del Sol this summer with Cloud and friends in FINAL FANTASY VII REBIRTH!  [/p][p]-Play the game that started it all, the classic FINAL FANTASY VII.[/p][p]-Dive into Zack Fair's gripping backstory in CRISIS CORE –FINAL FANTASY VII– REUNION.[/p][p]-Explore the outskirts of Midgar as Yuffie on her jampacked adventure in FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE INTERGRADE.[/p][p][/p]

body_text: Celebrate the legendary RPG series with discounts on critically-acclaimed titles, including DRAGON QUEST III HD-2D Remake! Build your perfect party of DRAGON QUEST games on Steam.

announcement_body.headline: DRAGON QUEST Celebration
announcement_body.body: Celebrate the legendary RPG series with discounts on critically-acclaimed titles, including DRAGON QUEST III HD-2D Remake! Build your perfect party of DRAGON QUEST games on Steam.

body_text: Golden Week is here! Celebrate the 15th anniversary of the NieR Franchise and find great deals across the Square Enix library in the Square Enix Golden Week Sale!

announcement_body.headline: Square Enix Golden Week Sale
announcement_body.body: Golden Week is here! Celebrate the 15th anniversary of the NieR Franchise and find great deals across the Square Enix library in the Square Enix Golden Week Sale!

source_title: Ben Starr on What RPG You Should Play Next
subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
Not sure which adventure to dive into next? We’ve brought in our contractual Best Friend, Ben Starr, to guide you through his top RPG picks from the past year.
View the full video here on YouTube:
https://store.steampowered.com/app/2909400/FINAL_FANTASY_VII_REBIRTH
https://store.steampowered.com/app/2490990/Visions_of_Mana/
https://store.steampowered.com/app/2844850/FANTASIAN_Neo_Dimension/
https://store.steampowered.com/bundle/21478/FINAL_FANTASY_IVI_Bundle/
https://store.steampowered.com/app/2701660/DRAGON_QUEST_III_HD2D_Remake/
https://store.steampowered.com/app/2455640/Romancing_SaGa_2_Revenge_of_the_Seven/
https://store.steampowered.com/app/2515020/FINAL_FANTASY_XVI/

Not sure which adventure to dive into next? We’ve brought in our contractual Best Friend, Ben Starr, to guide you through his top RPG picks from the past year.

View the full video here on YouTube: [previewyoutube=RZ7ZnJMYItg;full][/previewyoutube]


https://store.steampowered.com/app/2909400/FINAL_FANTASY_VII_REBIRTH
https://store.steampowered.com/app/2490990/Visions_of_Mana/
https://store.steampowered.com/app/2844850/FANTASIAN_Neo_Dimension/
https://store.steampowered.com/bundle/21478/FINAL_FANTASY_IVI_Bundle/
https://store.steampowered.com/app/2701660/DRAGON_QUEST_III_HD2D_Remake/
https://store.steampowered.com/app/2455640/Romancing_SaGa_2_Revenge_of_the_Seven/
https://store.steampowered.com/app/2515020/FINAL_FANTASY_XVI/

subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
Square Enix's biggest and best games are on Steam! Explore unforgettable experiences across critically-acclaimed franchises including FINAL FANTASY, KINGDOM HEARTS, NieR, and more!
Sale ends March 24th (10:00 am PDT)

announcement_body.headline: Square Enix Publisher Sale 2025
announcement_body.body:
Square Enix's biggest and best games are on Steam! Explore unforgettable experiences across critically-acclaimed franchises including FINAL FANTASY, KINGDOM HEARTS, NieR, and more!
Sale ends March 24th (10:00 am PDT)

source_title: Square Enix Lunar New Year Sale
subtitle: see announcement body
body_text: The year of the snake has arrived! Take part in the new year's celebration with huge discounts across the Square Enix catalogue.
body_raw: The year of the snake has arrived! Take part in the new year's celebration with huge discounts across the Square Enix catalogue.

announcement_body.headline: Square Enix Lunar New Year Sale
announcement_body.body: The year of the snake has arrived! Take part in the new year's celebration with huge discounts across the Square Enix catalogue.

subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
2024 is almost over! End the year on a high note with games like:
FINAL FANTASY XVI
Life is Strange: Double Exposure
Visions of Mana
KINGDOM HEARTS -HD 1.5+2.5 ReMIX-
Romancing SaGa 2: Revenge of the Seven
CRISIS CORE –FINAL FANTASY VII– REUNION
...and more!
Sale ends January 2, 2025 (10:00 am PST)
body_raw:

announcement_body.headline: Square Enix Winter Sale
announcement_body.body:
2024 is almost over! End the year on a high note with games like:
FINAL FANTASY XVI
Life is Strange: Double Exposure
Visions of Mana
KINGDOM HEARTS -HD 1.5+2.5 ReMIX-
Romancing SaGa 2: Revenge of the Seven
CRISIS CORE –FINAL FANTASY VII– REUNION
...and more!
Sale ends January 2, 2025 (10:00 am PST)

subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
Embark to the land of Valisthea and beyond in the Square Enix Autumn Sale. Immerse yourself in an instant classic and find great deals on games from throughout Square Enix's storied history.
Sale ends December 4, 2024 (10:00 am PST)

Sale ends December 4, 2024 (10:00 am PST)

announcement_body.headline: Square Enix Autumn Sale
announcement_body.body:
Embark to the land of Valisthea and beyond in the Square Enix Autumn Sale. Immerse yourself in an instant classic and find great deals on games from throughout Square Enix's storied history.
Sale ends December 4, 2024 (10:00 am PST)

subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
The Tokyo Game Show is here! Square Enix invites you to play games from some of Japan's most iconic brands in the Square Enix TGS Sale. Find great deals on legendary franchises like NieR, FINAL FANTASY, and so many more.
Sale ends September 30, 2024 (10:00 am PDT)
body_raw:
The Tokyo Game Show is here! Square Enix invites you to play games from some of Japan's most iconic brands in the Square Enix TGS Sale. Find great deals on legendary franchises like NieR, FINAL FANTASY, and so many more.
Sale ends September 30, 2024 (10:00 am PDT)

announcement_body.headline: Square Enix TGS Sale 2024
announcement_body.body:
The Tokyo Game Show is here! Square Enix invites you to play games from some of Japan's most iconic brands in the Square Enix TGS Sale. Find great deals on legendary franchises like NieR, FINAL FANTASY, and so many more.
Sale ends September 30, 2024 (10:00 am PDT)

subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
Begin your journey on Destiny Island in the games that started it all with KINGDOM HEARTS HD 1.5+2.5 ReMIX
Enroll in a summer course and take on the Mark of Mastery exam in KINGDOM HEARTS HD 2.8 Final Chapter Prologue
End your vacation on a high note by witnessing the conclusion of the Dark Seeker Saga in KINGDOM HEARTS III + Re Mind
Experience all this and more in the Square Enix summer sale!
© Disney. © Disney/Pixar. Developed by SQUARE ENIX
Sale ends July 11, 2024 (10:00 am PDT)
body_raw:
Begin your journey on Destiny Island in the games that started it all with KINGDOM HEARTS HD 1.5+2.5 ReMIX

Enroll in a summer course and take on the Mark of Mastery exam in KINGDOM HEARTS HD 2.8 Final Chapter Prologue

End your vacation on a high note by witnessing the conclusion of the Dark Seeker Saga in KINGDOM HEARTS III + Re Mind

Experience all this and more in the Square Enix summer sale!

© Disney. © Disney/Pixar. Developed by SQUARE ENIX

Sale ends July 11, 2024 (10:00 am PDT)

announcement_body.headline: Square Enix Summer Sale
announcement_body.body:
Begin your journey on Destiny Island in the games that started it all with KINGDOM HEARTS HD 1.5+2.5 ReMIX

Enroll in a summer course and take on the Mark of Mastery exam in KINGDOM HEARTS HD 2.8 Final Chapter Prologue

End your vacation on a high note by witnessing the conclusion of the Dark Seeker Saga in KINGDOM HEARTS III + Re Mind

Experience all this and more in the Square Enix summer sale!

© Disney. © Disney/Pixar. Developed by SQUARE ENIX

Sale ends July 11, 2024 (10:00 am PDT)

subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
Take part in the Golden Week festivities with Square Enix! Celebrate with deals across storied brands like FINAL FANTASY, NieR, DRAGON QUEST, and more!
Find these games and more in the Square Enix Golden Week sale!
Sale ends May 8, 2024 (10:00 am PDT)

announcement_body.headline: Square Enix Golden Week Sale
announcement_body.body:
Take part in the Golden Week festivities with Square Enix! Celebrate with deals across storied brands like FINAL FANTASY, NieR, DRAGON QUEST, and more!

Find these games and more in the Square Enix Golden Week sale!

Sale ends May 8, 2024 (10:00 am PDT)

subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
Experience a bold reimagining of the classic RPG in FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE INTERGRADE.
Relive some of gaming's most memorable moments and experience the journey of a young hero Sephiroth in FINAL FANTASY VII EVER CRISIS.
Break the limits of an HD Remaster with CRISIS CORE –FINAL FANTASY VII– REUNION.
And of course, return to the game that started it all with FINAL FANTASY VII.
Find these deals and many more in the Square Enix publisher sale!
Sale ends March 25th (10:00 am PST)
body_raw:
Experience a bold reimagining of the classic RPG in FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE INTERGRADE.

Relive some of gaming's most memorable moments and experience the journey of a young hero Sephiroth in FINAL FANTASY VII EVER CRISIS.

Break the limits of an HD Remaster with CRISIS CORE –FINAL FANTASY VII– REUNION.

And of course, return to the game that started it all with FINAL FANTASY VII.

Find these deals and many more in the Square Enix publisher sale!

Sale ends March 25th (10:00 am PST)

announcement_body.headline: Square Enix Publisher Sale 2024
announcement_body.body:
Experience a bold reimagining of the classic RPG in FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE INTERGRADE.

Relive some of gaming's most memorable moments and experience the journey of a young hero Sephiroth in FINAL FANTASY VII EVER CRISIS.

Break the limits of an HD Remaster with CRISIS CORE –FINAL FANTASY VII– REUNION.

And of course, return to the game that started it all with FINAL FANTASY VII.

Find these deals and many more in the Square Enix publisher sale!

Sale ends March 25th (10:00 am PST)

subtitle: see announcement body

announcement_body.headline: Square Enix Publisher Sale 2024
announcement_body.body:
Experience a bold reimagining of the classic RPG in FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE INTERGRADE.

Relive some of gaming's most memorable moments and experience the journey of a young hero Sephiroth in FINAL FANTASY VII EVER CRISIS.

Break the limits of an HD Remaster with CRISIS CORE –FINAL FANTASY VII– REUNION.

And of course, return to the game that started it all with FINAL FANTASY VII.

Find these deals and many more in the Square Enix publisher sale!

Sale ends March 25th (10:00 am PST)

announcement_body.headline: Square Enix Lunar New Year Sale
announcement_body.body:
The year of the dragon is upon us! Ring in the Lunar New Year with sales across our catalogue like:
CRISIS CORE –FINAL FANTASY VII– REUNION
FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE INTERGRADE
FINAL FANTASY XV
STRANGER OF PARADISE FINAL FANTASY ORIGIN
...and more!

subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
It's that time of year once again! Celebrate the holidays with games like:
OCTOPATH TRAVELER II
FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE INTERGRADE
NieR Replicant ver.1.22474487139...
CRISIS CORE –FINAL FANTASY VII– REUNION
Infinity Strash: DRAGON QUEST The Adventure of Dai
STRANGER OF PARADISE FINAL FANTASY ORIGIN
...and more!
Sale ends January 4, 2023 (10:00 am PST)

announcement_body.headline: Square Enix Winter Sale
announcement_body.body:
It's that time of year once again! Celebrate the holidays with games like:
OCTOPATH TRAVELER II
FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE INTERGRADE
NieR Replicant ver.1.22474487139...
CRISIS CORE –FINAL FANTASY VII– REUNION
Infinity Strash: DRAGON QUEST The Adventure of Dai
STRANGER OF PARADISE FINAL FANTASY ORIGIN
...and more!
Sale ends January 4, 2023 (10:00 am PST)

announcement_body.headline: Square Enix Winter Sale
announcement_body.body:
It's that time of year once again! Celebrate the holidays with games like:
OCTOPATH TRAVELER II
FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE INTERGRADE
NieR Replicant ver.1.22474487139...
CRISIS CORE –FINAL FANTASY VII– REUNION
Infinity Strash: DRAGON QUEST The Adventure of Dai
STRANGER OF PARADISE FINAL FANTASY ORIGIN
...and more!
Sale ends January 4, 2023 (10:00 am PST)

announcement_body.headline: Square Enix TGS Sale
announcement_body.body:
TGS is back! Take part in the global event with:
OCTOPATH TRAVELER II
FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE INTERGRADE
DRAGON QUEST TREASURES
FINAL FANTASY IX
...and more!
Sale ends September 25, 2023 (10:00 am PDT)

subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
The Square Enix Summer Sale has arrived! Enjoy the summer with titles like...
OCTOPATH TRAVELER II
Forspoken
Final Fantasy XV
NieR:Automata
FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE INTERGRADE
Stranger of Paradise: Final Fantasy Origin
...and more!
Sale ends July 13, 2023 (10:00 am PDT)

announcement_body.headline: Square Enix Summer Sale
announcement_body.body:
The Square Enix Summer Sale has arrived! Enjoy the summer with titles like...
OCTOPATH TRAVELER II
Forspoken
Final Fantasy XV
NieR:Automata
FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE INTERGRADE
Stranger of Paradise: Final Fantasy Origin
...and more!
Sale ends July 13, 2023 (10:00 am PDT)

announcement_body.headline: Square Enix Golden Week Sale
announcement_body.body:
Celebrate Golden Week with Square Enix! For a limited time save on titles like...

Forspoken
FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE INTERGRADE
NEO: The World Ends with You
PARANORMASIGHT: The Seven Mysteries of Honjo
...and more!
Sale ends May 8, 2023 (10:00 am PDT)

announcement_body.headline: Square Enix Winter Sale
announcement_body.body:
The Winter Sale is here! For a limited time save on great games like

FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE INTERGRADE
PowerWash Simulator
Outriders Worldslayer
STAR OCEAN THE DIVINE FORCE
VALKYRIE ELYSIUM
…and more!

Sale ends January 5 2023 (10:00 am PDT)

…and many more!
Sale ends September 28 2022 (6:00 pm PDT)"

announcement_body.headline: Square Enix Winter Sale
announcement_body.body:
The Square Enix Winter Sale is now live! For a limited time save on Square Enix favorites such as

Marvel’s Guardians of the Galaxy
Life Is Strange True Colors
Marvel’s Avengers
Voice Of Cards: The Isle Dragon Roars
NieR Replicant™ ver.1.22474487139...
Outriders

…and many more!

Sale ends January 5 2022 (10:00 am PST)

announcement_body.headline: Square Enix Autumn Sale
announcement_body.body:
The Square Enix Autumn Sale is now live! For a limited time save on Square Enix favorites such as

Marvel's Guardians Of The Galaxy
Life Is Strange: True Colors
Outriders
Marvel's Avengers
Just Cause 4
Deus Ex: Human Revolution
Powerwash Simulator

…and many more!

Sale ends December 1 (10:00 am PST)

subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
The Square Enix Autumn Sale is now live! For a limited time save on Square Enix favorites such as
Life Is Strange: True Colors
Outriders
Marvel's Avengers
Just Cause 4
Deus Ex: Human Revolution
Mini Ninjas
…and many more!
Sale ends November 24 (10:00 am PST)

announcement_body.headline: Square Enix Autumn Sale
announcement_body.body:
The Square Enix Autumn Sale is now live! For a limited time save on Square Enix favorites such as

Life Is Strange: True Colors
Outriders
Marvel's Avengers
Just Cause 4
Deus Ex: Human Revolution
Mini Ninjas

…and many more!

Sale ends November 24 (10:00 am PST)

subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
It’s been 25 years since the first Tomb Raider game launched, and we’re celebrating this milestone with a Tomb Raider 25th Anniversary Sale! Traverse through exotic worlds as Lara Croft, armed with only the raw instincts and physical ability to push beyond the limits of human endurance. For a limited time save on Tomb Raider favorites such as
Tomb Raider I
Tomb Raider GOTY
Rise of the Tomb Raider: 20 Year Celebration
Shadow of the Tomb Raider - Definitive Edition
Tomb Raider: Anniversary
…and many more!
Sale ends November 4 (10:00 am PST)
body_raw:
It’s been 25 years since the first Tomb Raider game launched, and we’re celebrating this milestone with a Tomb Raider 25th Anniversary Sale! Traverse through exotic worlds as Lara Croft, armed with only the raw instincts and physical ability to push beyond the limits of human endurance. For a limited time save on Tomb Raider favorites such as

Tomb Raider I
Tomb Raider GOTY
Rise of the Tomb Raider: 20 Year Celebration
Shadow of the Tomb Raider - Definitive Edition
Tomb Raider: Anniversary

…and many more!

Sale ends November 4 (10:00 am PST)

announcement_body.headline: Tomb Raider 25th Anniversary Sale
announcement_body.body:
It’s been 25 years since the first Tomb Raider game launched, and we’re celebrating this milestone with a Tomb Raider 25th Anniversary Sale! Traverse through exotic worlds as Lara Croft, armed with only the raw instincts and physical ability to push beyond the limits of human endurance. For a limited time save on Tomb Raider favorites such as

Tomb Raider I
Tomb Raider GOTY
Rise of the Tomb Raider: 20 Year Celebration
Shadow of the Tomb Raider - Definitive Edition
Tomb Raider: Anniversary

…and many more!

Sale ends November 4 (10:00 am PST)

source_title: Voice of Cards: The Isle Dragon Roars is out now!
subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
Voice of Cards: The Isle Dragon Roars is out now!
This game is an RPG presented entirely through the medium of cards, from the plains to the towns to the dungeons...
Battles take place under a turn-based system on a tabletop board, with the thrilling roll of a dice deciding damage and the status effects that are dealt!
Additional DLC to alter the design of the dice, cards and other objects used in the game themed around NieR Replicant ver.1.22474487139…are also available.
Check out this fascinating world of swords and sorcery, brought to you from the creative talents behind the NieR and Drakengard series; YOKO TARO, Keiichi Okabe and Kimihiko Fujisaka!
body_raw:
Voice of Cards: The Isle Dragon Roars is out now!

This game is an RPG  presented entirely through the medium of cards, from the plains to the towns to the dungeons...
Battles take place under a turn-based system on a tabletop board, with the thrilling roll of a dice deciding damage and the status effects that are dealt!

Additional DLC to alter the design of the dice, cards and other objects used in the game themed around NieR Replicant ver.1.22474487139…are also available.

Check out this fascinating world of swords and sorcery, brought to you from the creative talents behind the NieR and Drakengard series; YOKO TARO, Keiichi Okabe and Kimihiko Fujisaka!

announcement_body.headline: Voice of Cards: The Isle Dragon Roars is out now!
announcement_body.body:
Voice of Cards: The Isle Dragon Roars is out now!

This game is an RPG  presented entirely through the medium of cards, from the plains to the towns to the dungeons...
Battles take place under a turn-based system on a tabletop board, with the thrilling roll of a dice deciding damage and the status effects that are dealt!

Additional DLC to alter the design of the dice, cards and other objects used in the game themed around NieR Replicant ver.1.22474487139…are also available.

Check out this fascinating world of swords and sorcery, brought to you from the creative talents behind the NieR and Drakengard series; YOKO TARO, Keiichi Okabe and Kimihiko Fujisaka!

[url=https://store.steampowered.com/app/1113570?utm_source=event_3&utm_medium=post&utm_campaign=launchevent_jp][img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/28007909/cb12b08be2976d7f3f2d432cb2b59a375796d3d5.png[/img][/url]

announcement_body.headline: The Square Enix Summer Promotion is live!
announcement_body.body:
The Square Enix Summer Promotion is now live! Beat the heat and save on hundreds of Square Enix favorites. 

Featuring titles such as:

Marvel’s Avengers
OCTOPATH TRAVELER™
OUTRIDERS
NieR Replicant™ ver.1.22474487139...
PowerWash Simulator
FINAL FANTASY XV WINDOWS EDITION
Shadow of the Tomb Raider: Definitive Edition

…and many more!

Sale ends July 8th (10:05 am PST)

In celebration of the DRAGON QUEST franchise's 35th Anniversary we're providing some great offers on Steam!
Save on favorites such as:
- DRAGON QUEST® XI S: Echoes of an Elusive Age™ - Definitive Edition
- DRAGON QUEST BUILDERS™ 2
- DRAGON QUEST HEROES™ Slime Edition
- DRAGON QUEST HEROES™ II
Sale ends June 9th at 10:00am PST

source_title: The Square Enix Lunar New Year Sale is now live
subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
Celebrate the Year of the Ox with great deals from Square Enix.
Featuring titles like:
- Just Cause 4
- Shadow of the Tomb Raider: Definitive Edition
- Life is Strange 2: Complete Season
- Deus Ex: Mankind Divided
and many more!
Sale ends February 15th at 10:00am PST
body_raw:
Celebrate the Year of the Ox with great deals from Square Enix. 

Featuring titles like:

- Just Cause 4

and many more!

Sale ends February 15th at 10:00am PST

announcement_body.headline: The Square Enix Lunar New Year Sale is now live
announcement_body.body:
Celebrate the Year of the Ox with great deals from Square Enix. 

Featuring titles like:

- Just Cause 4
- Shadow of the Tomb Raider: Definitive Edition
- Life is Strange 2: Complete Season
- Deus Ex: Mankind Divided

and many more!

Sale ends February 15th at 10:00am PST

source_title: DRAGON QUEST XI S: Echoes of an Elusive Age - Definitive Edition Out Today
subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
DRAGON QUEST XI S: Echoes of an Elusive Age - Definitive Edition is Out Today!
Enjoy the new content and features of DRAGON QUEST XI S today. Play in 2D or 3D mode, experience new scenarios, Japanese voices, orchestral music and much more.
Story
It was the day that you, the hero of this tale celebrated your 16th Birthday.
Together with your childhood friend Gemma, you climbed to the top of Cobblestone Tor, to perform the coming of age rites that are customary in your village. However, a mysterious incident lead you to discover that you are the reincarnation of the legendary "Luminary".
What exactly is the "Luminary"?
You decide to leave the village and set out on a journey into the unknown world to seek the answer.
However, the people seem to have no welcome for a young Luminary and decry you as the spawn of the devil, sealing your fate to be an outcast...
Jump into the beautiful world of Erdrea, unravel the mystery of your past and claim some bonus content rewards!
We hope you enjoy your time with DRAGON QUEST XI S.
body_raw:
DRAGON QUEST XI S: Echoes of an Elusive Age - Definitive Edition is Out Today!

Enjoy the new content and features of DRAGON QUEST XI S today. Play in 2D or 3D mode, experience new scenarios, Japanese voices, orchestral music and much more. 

[previewyoutube=tOXK1rq1Y9k;leftthumb][/previewyoutube]

[h2]Story[/h2]

It was the day that you, the hero of this tale celebrated your 16th Birthday.
Together with your childhood friend Gemma, you climbed to the top of Cobblestone Tor, to perform the coming of age rites that are customary in your village. However, a mysterious incident lead you to discover that you are the reincarnation of the legendary "Luminary".

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/1012195/22786ccb22fc27688b790785100e4ad0709cc771.jpg[/img]

[h2]What exactly is the "Luminary"?[/h2]

You decide to leave the village and set out on a journey into the unknown world to seek the answer.
However, the people seem to have no welcome for a young Luminary and decry you as the spawn of the devil, sealing your fate to be an outcast...

Jump into the beautiful world of Erdrea, unravel the mystery of your past and claim some bonus content rewards!

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/1012195/a3ac2ca53f0a525e4f3aa2cc6825ae1d0d523824.jpg[/img]

We hope you enjoy your time with DRAGON QUEST XI S.

Jouez en mode 2D ou 3D, profitez de nouveaux scénarios, doublages japonais, musiques orchestrales et plus !","Divertiti con i nuovi contenuti e funzionalità di DRAGON QUEST XI S. Gioca in modalità 2D o 3D e scopri nuovi scenari, doppiaggio in giapponese, musica orchestrale e altro ancora!","용사를 “제대로” 즐겨보자.
3D 모드, 2D 모드를 즐길 수 있으며, 시나리오, 음성이 추가된 「드래곤 퀘스트 XI S 지나간 시간을 찾아서 - Definitive Edition」이 Steam™으로 등장!","Disfruta del nuevo contenido y las funciones de DRAGON QUEST XI S. ¡Juega en el modo gráfico 2D o 3D, disfruta de nuevos escenarios, doblaje japonés, música orquestal y mucho más!","享受“最丰富”的勇者之旅。

可以游玩３Ｄ与２Ｄ模式，并新增剧情及配音，包含众多让冒险更加丰富之系统的《勇者斗恶龙XI S 寻觅逝去的时光 - Definitive Edition》，终于登陆Steam™！","享受「最豐富」的勇者之旅。

可以遊玩３Ｄ與２Ｄ模式，並新增劇情及配音，包含眾多讓冒險更加豐富之系統的『勇者鬥惡龍XI S 尋覓逝去的時光 - Definitive Edition』，終於登陸Steam™！",null,null,"勇者を“フル”で楽しもう。

３Dモードと２Dモードがどっちも遊べ、さらにシナリオ・ボイスも追加され、 冒険を彩るシステムが盛りだくさんの『ドラゴンクエストXI S』が、ついにSteam™で楽しめる！",null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null],"localized_title_image":["41e535ff2d166724facf5c9a5393d50bf975b48b.jpg","eb8158b98b4742eee0c3a9f79b0c7ccdea4febbb.jpg","6203714017c8559aff4882f93650cff4ebf8f2c9.jpg","a86395be6b588b8bc88c2b06e9d9e69a40b8498c.jpg","d5f45d0bdbca5e30e07af96d0459a5dd12147855.jpg","73839ca9b0212989be671b4c8266f95decb616cf.jpg","28d2a3cbc3dbffecf5acc1c578080a697c34b48c.jpg","54c826b3099caf27f85bcf92be82e78930aa5f78.jpg",null,null,"91b0768d50aa0e59d14f2a9af4348a59adef2676.jpg",null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null],"localized_capsule_image":["40e8ce6609023d7a1f676899bfee0e49ae0f1a44.jpg","5c71a16a1685b777a11364823cc14deff3aa342e.jpg","75c1f7aed65dbef926054a24516500b892ba0f12.jpg","55a31a8446a98cd6151b97b4b96f7f274514c5b2.jpg","5394df6bfcc9f46af978baa05b1e36776670ea83.jpg","0dc95074f270226ea539d316e6a702dfbb1f4108.jpg","67c833b031d41c7e6f0ce5be55b0de529a0720eb.jpg","7a205cafbf99530fc9e77064e7f62075717aea97.jpg",null,null,"d8fe231004bc8051d2010cc92f3ffbb3598a70f1.jpg",null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null],"localized_spotlight_image":["346e5c1b38484741eda8d14f3aff7eda3b39c16b.jpg","ec9b600b577dbd01913f2d3dacdc01b8bc7c4dd6.jpg","fce3b8323f40b6fdf08dca14c211af659d1e4109.jpg","cd06fdbed9adae47568976ab92cb9089feff9a5e.jpg","9c03a693f64d4c5ee9a8d8f42e6fe5be3fdc4b27.jpg","50dbd962e13a73e3c540788c64b049944d5c8d42.jpg","53d84ed1db7e93316ab50217c0209ea8f42f4dc8.jpg","8b06108c1411acc0653def9ad315a5749cd9ed12.jpg",null,null,"f7f1fcfef55da3b6ce2c3aba44ad9397d2261155.jpg",null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null],"bSaleEnabled":false,"sale_show_creator":false,"sale_sections":[],"sale_browsemore_text":"","sale_browsemore_url":"","sale_browsemore_color":"","sale_browsemore_bgcolor":"","localized_sale_header":[null,null,null,nu announcement_body.headline: DRAGON QUEST XI S: Echoes of an Elusive Age - Definitive Edition Out Today
announcement_body.body:
DRAGON QUEST XI S: Echoes of an Elusive Age - Definitive Edition is Out Today!

Enjoy the new content and features of DRAGON QUEST XI S today. Play in 2D or 3D mode, experience new scenarios, Japanese voices, orchestral music and much more. 

[previewyoutube=tOXK1rq1Y9k;leftthumb][/previewyoutube]

[h2]Story[/h2]

It was the day that you, the hero of this tale celebrated your 16th Birthday.
Together with your childhood friend Gemma, you climbed to the top of Cobblestone Tor, to perform the coming of age rites that are customary in your village. However, a mysterious incident lead you to discover that you are the reincarnation of the legendary "Luminary".

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/1012195/22786ccb22fc27688b790785100e4ad0709cc771.jpg[/img]

[h2]What exactly is the "Luminary"?[/h2]

You decide to leave the village and set out on a journey into the unknown world to seek the answer.
However, the people seem to have no welcome for a young Luminary and decry you as the spawn of the devil, sealing your fate to be an outcast...

Jump into the beautiful world of Erdrea, unravel the mystery of your past and claim some bonus content rewards!

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/1012195/a3ac2ca53f0a525e4f3aa2cc6825ae1d0d523824.jpg[/img]

We hope you enjoy your time with DRAGON QUEST XI S.

source_title: The all-new Showtime! BALAN WONDERWORLD Opening Movie finally revealed
subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
The BALAN WONDERWORLD Opening Movie sets the stage for Leo and Emma’s adventure in Wonderworld. Watch as the Balan Theatre come to life in this wondrous action platformer adventure.
Twelve different tales await our stars in Wonderworld, each with their own unique quirks. They will explore all corners of these labyrinthine stages, filled with a myriad of tricks and traps, to get to the heart of each story.
The stage doors for Square Enix’s newest 3D Action-Platformer open on Friday 26th March 2021! Pre-purchase on Steam today.
body_raw:
The BALAN WONDERWORLD Opening Movie sets the stage for Leo and Emma’s adventure in Wonderworld. Watch as the Balan Theatre come to life in this wondrous action platformer adventure.

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/1012195/0103d9dc10e31a6e5b55083aef5f81dcba53077d.png[/img]

Twelve different tales await our stars in Wonderworld, each with their own unique quirks. They will explore all corners of these labyrinthine stages, filled with a myriad of tricks and traps, to get to the heart of each story.

The stage doors for Square Enix’s newest 3D Action-Platformer open on Friday 26th March 2021! Pre-purchase on Steam today.

announcement_body.headline: The all-new Showtime! BALAN WONDERWORLD Opening Movie finally revealed
announcement_body.body:
The BALAN WONDERWORLD Opening Movie sets the stage for Leo and Emma’s adventure in Wonderworld. Watch as the Balan Theatre come to life in this wondrous action platformer adventure.

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/1012195/0103d9dc10e31a6e5b55083aef5f81dcba53077d.png[/img]

Twelve different tales await our stars in Wonderworld, each with their own unique quirks. They will explore all corners of these labyrinthine stages, filled with a myriad of tricks and traps, to get to the heart of each story.

The stage doors for Square Enix’s newest 3D Action-Platformer open on Friday 26th March 2021! Pre-purchase on Steam today.

source_title: Save 55% on Life is Strange 2 Complete Season
subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
Save 55% on the Complete Season of Life is Strange 2. Ends October 6th.
If your epic journey with Sean and Daniel began with the FREE Episode 1, there's never been a better time to finish the road trip and change the lives of the Diaz Brothers forever!
Pick up the Complete Season today, and you can delve deeper into the story in Episodes 2-5, as the boys flee towards their father’s hometown of Puerto Lobos, Mexico.
From the snowy suburbs of Beaver Creek, Oregon, to the towering redwoods of an illegal plantation in California, down to the sun-blasted highways of Nevada and beyond, Sean and Daniel’s lives only get more complicated as their journey continues. Together, they’ll make new friends, grow as people and as brothers, and try their best to stay one step ahead of the law.
Through it all, you’ll help Sean guide Daniel towards the young man he will become. Still just a teenager himself, will your Sean enforce the rules, or let them slide? Explore his own freedom, or stick close to his little brother?
And what about Daniel’s incredible supernatural power? As Daniel becomes more confident in his telekinetic abilities – and ever more independent – Sean’s guidance could be all that keeps the boys from disaster and devastation.
Your choices will shape how this journey ends – and change the lives of everybody you meet along the way!
- Complete Season includes all 5 Episodes
https://store.steampowered.com/bundle/16140/Life_is_Strange_2_Complete_Season/

announcement_body.headline: SQUARE ENIX SUMMER PROMOTION

source_title: Support worthy causes and Stay Home & Play with the Square Enix Eidos Anthology
subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
Hello everyone - we’re excited to reveal our next Square Enix Stay Home & Play Bundle.
As you may already know, the Square Enix Stay Home & Play campaign rewards gamers for practicing social distancing, and also help charities that need support in this uncertain period.
As part of the initiative, we’re releasing Steam bundles featuring many of our greatest games at bargain prices. A full 100% of the Square Enix revenue from these bundles will to be distributed to charities across North America and Europe, including food banks and more.
So by buying one of these bundles, you’re helping those in need and getting lots of great games to play. And when we say lots we mean it.
The next bundle is…… (dramatic drum roll please) the Square Enix Eidos Anthology on PC!
This colossal collection features 54 games, from some of the biggest franchises in gaming. We’re talking Tomb Raider, Just Cause, Deus Ex and more!
Just take a look at what you get.
1. Rise of the Tomb Raider
2. Just Cause 3
3. Deus Ex: Mankind Divided
4. Life is Strange: Complete Season
5. Sleeping Dogs: Definitive Edition

The Square Enix Eidos Anthology Collection is available for PC on Steam from May 8th 10am PDT to May 11th 10am PDT. We hope that this bumper bundle helps you while you remain in the house - your purchase will definitely help others.
Please continue to look after yourselves, support each other and Stay Home & Play.
For more information about the Square Enix Stay Home & Play initiative, make sure you follow us on social media:

source_title: Deus Ex games on sale, Eidos-Montréal and Square Enix proceeds benefit charity
subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
The gaming community knows the importance of uniting in the face of adversity. In this spirit, we’d like to inspire everyone to make an impact: even from quarantine, you can help those in need in the difficult situation caused by COVID-19. Eidos-Montréal and Square Enix will make a donation to Food Banks of Quebec in an amount equal to the proceeds Square Enix receives from purchases of games in the Deus Ex franchise on Steam between March 30, 2020 at 12am, and April 1, 2020 at 11:59pm PDT.
The following Deus Ex games are included in this event: the Game of the Year Edition of Deus Ex (the original masterpiece), Deus Ex: Invisible War, the Director's Cut of the applauded Deus Ex: Human Revolution, and the critically acclaimed Deus Ex: Mankind Divided, the latest entry in the franchise.
For more information on Food Banks of Quebec, please visit https://www.banquesalimentaires.org/en/.
Stay safe and happy gaming!
BUY NOW:
https://store.steampowered.com/app/337000/Deus_Ex_Mankind_Divided/
https://store.steampowered.com/app/238010/Deus_Ex_Human_Revolution__Directors_Cut/
https://store.steampowered.com/app/6920/Deus_Ex_Invisible_War/
https://store.steampowered.com/app/6910/Deus_Ex_Game_of_the_Year_Edition/

announcement_body.headline: Deus Ex games on sale, Eidos-Montréal and Square Enix proceeds benefit charity
announcement_body.body:
The gaming community knows the importance of uniting in the face of adversity. In this spirit, we’d like to inspire everyone to make an impact: even from quarantine, you can help those in need in the difficult situation caused by COVID-19. Eidos-Montréal and Square Enix will make a donation to Food Banks of Quebec in an amount equal to the proceeds Square Enix receives from purchases of games in the Deus Ex franchise on Steam between March 30, 2020 at 12am, and April 1, 2020 at 11:59pm PDT.
 
The following Deus Ex games are included in this event: the Game of the Year Edition of Deus Ex (the original masterpiece), Deus Ex: Invisible War, the Director's Cut of the applauded Deus Ex: Human Revolution, and the critically acclaimed Deus Ex: Mankind Divided, the latest entry in the franchise.  

For more information on Food Banks of Quebec, please visit https://www.banquesalimentaires.org/en/. 
 
Stay safe and happy gaming!

BUY NOW: 

https://store.steampowered.com/app/337000/Deus_Ex_Mankind_Divided/ 

https://store.steampowered.com/app/238010/Deus_Ex_Human_Revolution__Directors_Cut/

https://store.steampowered.com/app/6920/Deus_Ex_Invisible_War/ 

https://store.steampowered.com/app/6910/Deus_Ex_Game_of_the_Year_Edition/

source_title: Stay Home and Play | Download 2 Tomb Raider Games FREE for a Limited Time!
subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
We’re warmed by stories of communities banding together to support those in need during uncertain times, and by honoring directives intended to protect the most vulnerable among us.
Gamers are part of a global community. We regularly rally together online to return balance to fantasy kingdoms, recruit crew to save the universe from sci-fi threats, and indulge in healthy competition through high-octane action games. For others, shifting to both online work and play is unfamiliar territory.
With this in mind, we’re offering a gift to our community. Starting right now through Monday, March 23 at 11:59PM PDT, we’re releasing both Tomb Raider (2013) and Lara Croft and the Temple of Osiris for free on Steam.
Tomb Raider
Tomb Raider explores the intense and gritty origin story of Lara Croft and her ascent from a young woman to a hardened survivor. Armed only with raw instincts and the ability to push beyond the limits of human endurance, Lara must fight to unravel the dark history of a forgotten island to escape its relentless hold.
Lara Croft and the Temple of Osiris
Lara Croft and the Temple of Osiris takes place deep in the deserts of Egypt. In her new adventure, Lara must join forces with rival treasure hunter Carter Bell and imprisoned gods Horus and Isis, to defeat the evil god Set. As Lara and her companions fight the elements of nature across the sands and through ancient tombs, they will battle legendary deities and creatures of myth. With the fate of the world at stake, Lara must recover the fragments of Osiris to stop Set from enslaving all mankind.
